creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
I'm attempting to update ports I maintain to their
newest versions (graphics/synfig && graphics/synfigstudio) which
ultimately pull in graphics/libheif. But graphics/libheif fails
build with the following:

====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
===>  Installing for libheif-1.14.0_1
===>  Checking if libheif is already installed
===>   Registering installation for libheif-1.14.0_1 as automatic
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/graphics/libheif/work/stage/usr/local/share/man/man1/heif-convert.1.gz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/graphics/libheif/work/stage/usr/local/share/man/man1/heif-enc.1.gz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/graphics/libheif/work/stage/usr/local/share/man/man1/heif-info.1.gz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/graphics/libheif/work/stage/usr/local/share/man/man1/heif-thumbnailer.1.gz:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/libheif
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick6
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/synfig

pkg-plist problem?

Thanks in advance for any attention you can give this.

--Chris
